'''âs-r-v-d''' ('''kasarvedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bearbait|bearbait]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bearbait|bearbait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-r-v-d
|-
! Lemma
| kasarvedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisarvedoko|thisarvedoko]] || [[word:jisarvedoko|jisarvedoko]] || [[word:shisarvedoko|shisarvedoko]] || [[word:kisarvedoko|kisarvedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusarvedoko|thuthusarvedoko]] || [[word:jujusarvedoko|jujusarvedoko]] || [[word:shushusarvedoko|shushusarvedoko]] || [[word:kukusarvedoko|kukusarvedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosarvedoko|thosarvedoko]] || [[word:josarvedoko|josarvedoko]] || [[word:shosarvedoko|shosarvedoko]] || [[word:kosarvedoko|kosarvedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsarvedoko|thĂŠsarvedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsarvedoko|jĂŠsarvedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsarvedoko|shĂŠsarvedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsarvedoko|kĂŠsarvedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasarvedoko|thasarvedoko]] || [[word:jasarvedoko|jasarvedoko]] || [[word:shasarvedoko|shasarvedoko]] || [[word:kasarvedoko|kasarvedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
